t_ch: 你是为见到「祂」而战？
t_en: Are you fighting to see "THEM?"

t_ch: 嗯…这是我的私心。
t_en: Yes... this is my wish.

t_ch: 倒下、站起、再次倒下、再次站起，无数次的锤炼，徘徊于生死，只为让我等更接近「纯美」曾行过的旅路。
t_en: It is a never-ending cycle of falling... and standing up again. Each time I wander closer to death, it gets me closer to the path the Beauty once walked.

t_ch: 这便是我身为纯美骑士的誓言。
t_en: This is my vow as a Knight of Beauty.

t_ch: …那你之后怎么办？
t_en: What are your plans after that?

t_ch: 我会在此后，独自寻找办法出逃。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
t_en: I shall find a way to escape. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.

t_ch: 我有办法帮你吗？
t_en: Can I do anything to help?

t_ch: 无需此举，我非常感谢。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
t_en: Thank you, but that won't be necessary. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.

t_ch: 为什么要单独和我说？
t_en: Why did you want to talk to me alone?

t_ch: 我们的交手只到一半…尚武者不善言辞，我还有另一半未传达给你。
t_en: We were interrupted halfway through our battle. As a warrior, articulation has never been my forte, yet I still needed to impart the remaining half to you.

t_ch: 我为自己的多言致歉，我实在不擅长表达自我…回到最初——你是否会支持我的想法？
t_en: I apologize, I have been rambling. As I said, articulation has never been my forte. Let us return to the point at hand. Do I have your support?

t_ch: 我支持你。
t_en: I support you.

t_ch: 你支持我…真的？谢谢，谢谢……
t_en: You do...? Thank you.

t_ch: 你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
t_en: Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.

t_ch: 那么……
t_en: In that case...

t_ch: 我仍然反对。
t_en: I'm still against it.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，为什么？
t_en: Why, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我不想让你以身涉险。
t_en: I don't want you to put your life in danger.

t_ch: 你是在担心我吗？谢谢，谢谢……
t_en: You worry for my safety? Thank you.

t_ch: 你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
t_en: Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.

t_ch: 但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
t_en: But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.

t_ch: 你只是以「幻觉」宽慰自身。
t_en: You're just consoling yourself with those "hallucinations".

t_ch: 是这样吗？也曾有许多人如此劝说，或许你们是对的。
t_en: Is that so? Many others have said the same. Perhaps you're right.

t_ch: 但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
t_en: But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.

t_ch: 请原谅我不合时宜的举动。我们虽相识不久，但彼此已以交手定下交情——我只可惜它还未完成！我想在临走前了结这份遗憾！
t_en: Please forgive my inappropriate manner. Our friendship is new, but was forged in the heat of battle, which I only wish we had been able to conclude. I hope now we may conclude it still, that I may leave without regret!

t_ch: 我将以枪刃证明我的意志，用尚武礼仪捍卫自己的荣誉；无论结局是赢是输，我都将接受，并以此与你告别——
t_en: I shall prove my will with the blade, defend my honor and uphold my dignity with the protocol of combat... Win or lose, I will accept the outcome and thus bid you farewell...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…你的举止、力量、行战的礼仪…已令我心服口服。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Your demeanor, strength, and the etiquette of your combat... I admit, you have won me over.

t_ch: 若要我评价这场较量——精彩绝伦、酣畅淋漓！有幸遇见这样的对手，我也以身证明了「纯美」的存在。
t_en: Extraordinary and enjoyable in equal measure! Encountering an opponent of your caliber proves the existence of "the Beauty."

t_ch: 请恕我在这之前冒犯激进，因为我知晓当这场战斗结束，就标志着——我将从列车的故事中退场，而现在终于来到了这一刻。
t_en: The end of our battle signifies my departure... the moment has finally arrived for me to bid farewell to the Express.

t_ch: 你确定自己能安全脱身吧？
t_en: You're confident you can get out alive?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我予以保证：我并非鲁莽冲动之人，我将做好万全准备，找准时机脱身。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I assure you, I am not a reckless person. I will ready myself for the opportunity to escape.

t_ch: 我们还会再相逢吗？
t_en: Will we meet again?

t_ch: 我来到列车是为助众人解决危机，当使命完成，我将回归银河。但…银河这么大，我们说不定还会再见。
t_en: I came to the Express to help you find a solution to this crisis. When my mission is complete, I shall venture back into the cosmos... but the cosmos is boundless — we may yet have another encounter.

t_ch: …我做好准备说再见啦。
t_en: I'm ready to say goodbye.

t_ch: 非常好，{NICKNAME}，纯美骑士的使命完成后，就将去寻找下一片亟待守护之地…
t_en: Excellent, {NICKNAME}. After completing my mission here, I shall find somewhere else that requires my protection.

t_ch: 身为骑士，我肩负必胜的决心与荣誉；我的身躯经过无数次训武淬炼，绝不会轻易被折断。
t_en: Worry not. As a knight, I bear the resolve and honor of assured victory — my body, tempered by countless battles, will not easily be broken.

t_ch: 如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感…如此瑰丽。
t_en: Such a brief, fortuitous encounter... It has been an honor knowing each and every one of you on the Express.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…能与你交手，我十分荣幸
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it is an honor to fight against you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你觉得是否还有更好的办法
t_en: {NICKNAME}, do you have any solutions?

t_ch: 唉…
t_en: *sigh*

t_ch: 去和大家聊聊吧…
t_en: Let's go talk with the others.

t_ch: 你和银枝交涉得如何，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: So, how did your talk with Argenti go, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 他想自己挑战巨型真蛰虫。
t_en: He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.

t_ch: 原来如此。他有这种想法，我毫不惊讶…不得不承认，我看到类似的行为，偶尔会想起年轻时的自己；出于理性，我并不认可这种作法。但…{NICKNAME}，你又如何看待？
t_en: I see... Based on our dealings with him so far, I can't say I'm overly surprised. Sounds like the kind of plan a younger me might have come up with... but that doesn't mean I approve of it. How do you see things, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 认同银枝。
t_en: I agree with Argenti.

t_ch: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
t_en: ...I suppose it all depends on how you see his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，如果你真已经认定，我相信你的判断。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you're certain, I trust your judgment.

t_ch: 不理解银枝。
t_en: I don't understand Argenti.

t_ch: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
t_en: ...I suppose it all depends on whether you support his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们无法改变个人对自我本心的执拗。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we can't change what other people long for.

t_ch: 我刚打了个盹，梦里看到窗外有另一个自己。驾驶着银枝的希世难得号在天空上飞……
t_en: *yawn* I took a nap just now and dreamt there was another me piloting Argenti's One and Only...

t_ch: 你说我是怎么了？平常我都不做梦。梦里那个偷了银枝飞船的我，还对我自己说「快去找银枝」……
t_en: What's wrong with me? I never dream. After stealing Argenti's spaceship, I said to myself: "Go find Argenti."

t_ch: 我压根不关心谁，不过这个怪梦让我很在意，所以银枝那家伙到底打算干什么？
t_en: I—I'm not the type to start caring about people I've only just met, but the dream made me feel a little uneasy... So, what on earth is Argenti up to, anyway?

t_ch: 他想独自挑战巨真蛰虫。
t_en: He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.

t_ch: 哈？！什、什么？！那么大的虫子，他打算自己一个人去对付？
t_en: Ha!? Wh—What!? He wants to fight that huge bug on his own?

t_ch: 这家伙说自己死而无憾，说什么和盆栽告别，原来不是在搞笑啊？！居然是认真的？你不会答应他了吧？
t_en: So all that talk of "departing the mortal coil" and "bidding farewell to a plant" — that was all serious!? You refused him, right?

t_ch: 是他执意要这么做。
t_en: He insisted.

t_ch: 这不是送死？！就为这种理由？他到底在固执个啥？我倒不太关心，我只关心他死了我的人生转机怎么办？…好吧，我确实关心。
t_en: That's a suicide mission! And for what? D—Don't get me wrong, I don't really care... But if he dies, how am I going to turn my life around? ...Alright, fine, I care about him.

t_ch: 你开始担心他了？
t_en: Are you worried about him?

t_ch: 别瞎说，没有的事，我一点也不关心他，我只关心他死了我的人生转机怎么办？难以理解，好死不如赖活着，他到底在固执个啥？…好吧，我确实开始担心了。
t_en: Nonsense. Me? Care about him? Impossible. But if he dies, how am I going to turn my life around? I don't understand why he'd choose to die when he could live. Why is he so stubborn? ...Alright, fine, I care about him.

t_ch: 这个脑袋一根筋的家伙！难道对于他来说，信仰真比命更重要？不行，我得去跟他吵一架！
t_en: Why is he so difficult!? Are his beliefs more important than his life? No way, I've got to talk some sense into him!

t_ch: 跳出列车后，我会以长枪刺破巨真蛰虫胃壁，希望能使其产生剧烈痉挛，列车便可冲出虫体。
t_en: After jumping from the Express, I shall pierce the wall of the Giant Sting's stomach. It should then violently convulse so the Express can escape the confines of its body.

t_ch: 维利特，你特地前来，是有话想对我说？
t_en: Velite, have you something to say?

t_ch: 你这么做真是有点没头脑！你把自己置于危险境地里了。一定要履行骑士职责？换种方式不行？我们这种俗人实在难以理解。
t_en: ...I—It's reckless to put yourself in danger! Do you really have to fulfill your knightly duty? Isn't there another way? I just don't get it.

t_ch: 难道你是在关心我？或许你也未察觉自己灵魂的高贵——表征虽与我不同，但仍有自己的风采。我希望我能守护住我的誓言：助你抵达终点。
t_en: You, too, are worried for my safety? You may not have realized, but you have a unique and noble soul. I hope I can keep my promise to escort you to your destination.
You...

t_ch: 脚一跺牙一咬，我维利特也能有点骨气。要是你听不进去，那我就陪你一起去！
t_en: Wh—What the heck. Fine, I can be brave too y'know. If you insist on doing this, then... I'm coming with you!

t_ch: 反正我这命也是你捡的，哎唷，虽然我这力气帮不到什么，但多少也能打点下手……
t_en: If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be alive right now. I may not be as strong as you, but I'll do whatever I can.

t_ch: 我很感谢，但你无需勉强。
t_en: I appreciate that, but it would be best for you to remain on the Express.

t_ch: 哼…你…我真搞不定你。行吧。
t_en: I... You... Hmph... You're impossible. Fine...

t_ch: 我突然觉得，我们要不是因为意外相识，一定是毫不相关的两类人，完全不会成为朋友。你的人生叫英雄传说，我呢就叫三流小说。
t_en: It suddenly struck me that if it weren't for this accident, we would never have met, let alone become friends. My life is a third-rate fiction next to your heroic saga, but at least they coincided...

t_ch: 所以…我们没得商量啦？必须得在这告别？那……
t_en: So you still want to do it? Are we going to say goodbye here? Then...

t_ch: 你别把自己交代在这里啊！我会等你回来的！等我们搞定这次危机，你就要帮我在公司做点代言！重要的是你千万别死在这里——
t_en: Don't die! I'll be waiting for you! After we fix this mess, you've got some spokesperson duties at my company to attend to! Just make sure you come back in one piece...

t_ch: 请勿担心，我会高喊「纯美的女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！」
t_en: Do not worry. You will hear my shout: "Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!"

t_ch: 在保证列车安全脱出后，自寻出路，平安脱险，以待我们的下一次相见。
t_en: Once the Express is safely out, I will devise my own exit plan and navigate my way to safety. Until next time!

t_ch: 倘若您能见证这一切…您便可理解我狂热的理想。
t_en: Having witnessed this spectacle... I am sure you will come to grasp the depth of my convictions.

t_ch: 在宇宙的猩红长夜里，我的一生比赤子更为忠诚！
t_en: In the sanguine, eternal night of the universe, my existence professes a loyalty greater than the guileless!

t_ch: 不知道银枝乘客怎么样了…虽然列车摆脱了这次危机，但不知道为什么还是高兴不起来帕……
t_en: The Express managed to escape the crisis, but Pom-Pom still feels a little sad... Pom-Pom wonders what happened to Argenti.

t_ch: 唉…维利特刚刚也自己下车走了，他看起来好难过啊。大概他也搞不懂银枝在想什么吧……
t_en: *sigh* Velite just left the Express too — he looked really upset. I guess he didn't know what Argenti was thinking, either...

t_ch: 纯美骑士团，一群习惯独行星河中、很难被理解的人。他们的归宿本就是星空，这场烟花或许也象征着对他的授勋。
t_en: The Knights of Beauty are made up of individuals who are used to traveling through the cosmos alone... they are difficult to understand, and the starry sky is their home. Perhaps this firework show is a symbol of his honor.

t_ch: 可惜这么大的烟花……
t_en: But the fireworks...

t_ch: 这么漂亮的星空……
t_en: ...And the starry sky...

t_ch: 他都看不到了……
t_en: ...He didn't see it...

t_ch: 他也有自己的想法与苦衷。毕竟纯美的星神…很可能已陨落了。
t_en: He has his own goals... and struggles. After all, the Aeon of Beauty has likely already fallen.

t_ch: 啊？银枝嘴里一直念的伊德莉拉吗？他不是还一直说要去找伊德莉拉，尽骑士职责保护伊德莉拉吗？
t_en: Huh? You mean Idrila — the one he wouldn't stop talking about? But... he said he'd find them... and fulfill his duty to protect them.

t_ch: 伊德莉拉已陨是部分纯美骑士默认的事情。当然也有些家伙不愿相信，比如你刚遇见的这位…他大约觉得伊德莉拉只是失踪，并藏在某个凡人无法企及的角落里了。
t_en: The fact that Idrila has fallen is tacitly acknowledged by some Knights of Beauty. Naturally, there are others who don't want to believe it... like the one you met. He probably thinks that Idrila is simply missing — hiding somewhere beyond the reach of mortals.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这次的危机结束了，偶然的访客也已离开。但我觉得，我们还有些话题可以聊聊。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, the crisis is over, and our unexpected guest has left, but I think there's still something we should talk about.

t_ch: 比如…你觉得…什么是「纯美」？
t_en: ...In your opinion, what is beauty?

t_ch: 爱人的眼睛。
t_en: A lover's eyes.

t_ch: 那一定是双非常美的眼睛。
t_en: They must be beautiful eyes.

t_ch: 吃喝玩乐永远不上班！
t_en: All fun and no work!

t_ch: 那就是所有人梦寐以求的美好生活。
t_en: Sounds like a wonderful life — I'm sure many have dreams of that.

t_ch: 如痴如狂地观看小猫咪进食。
t_en: Obsessively watching cats eat food.

t_ch: 你确实想得很美。
t_en: Haha, you have a wild imagination.

t_ch: 列车组，大家之间的…
t_en: That which exists between the Crew...

t_ch: 噢？很好的回答。
t_en: Oh? That's a good answer.

t_ch: 「纯美」的形态各异、变化万千，每个人心里的答案都不同…我很好奇，纯美骑士在银河中追寻的究竟是什么？
t_en: Beauty takes many forms, and different people have different answers... I wonder what exactly it is that the Knights of Beauty are pursuing through the cosmos.

t_ch: 假设银枝找到了「失踪」的伊德莉拉，以人类的双眼，他能辨认出来吗？还是面对自己所执着的「祂」，却像盲人一样视而不见，甚至浑然不觉……
t_en: Let's assume that Argenti finds the "missing" Idrila. Will he be able to recognize THEM with his human eyes? Or, obsessed with his version of "THEM," will he turn a blind eye and not even see THEM for who THEY are?

t_ch: 是哦，他真的像是会在眼睛上蒙上白布，然后要在自己附加的这种严苛筹码里与木桩对战、修炼自己的人。
t_en: Mm... It did seem like he had a kind of... tunnel vision. And it sounded like he was holding himself to unreachable standards to attain his dreams.

t_ch: 我是不懂诶，反正嘛，要是有一天，看到他在贝洛伯格翻垃圾桶，对着里面大喊「伊德莉拉，你在吗！在吗在吗在吗！」我，我好像也不意外……
t_en: I didn't quite wrap my head around him... I guess if we're ever back in Belobog and see a red-headed knight shouting into trashcans — "Idrila, are you in there!? Idrilaaaa!" ...I won't be surprised.

t_ch: 不过那又怎么样咧？我还是觉得他是个好人呀…虽然怪怪的……
t_en: But, so what? I still think he was a nice guy, even if he was a bit weird...

t_ch: 唉…我们原本是要去哪里来着帕？
t_en: *sigh* Where were we supposed to be going again?

t_ch: 咦…有点奇怪帕。帕姆刚刚选定了行进的路线……
t_en: Hmm... something seems off. Pom-Pom already selected a route...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: Is something wrong?

t_ch: 现在前进的方向有一点小偏差。让帕姆看看…列车长对航行的把控向来精准无误，如果发生一点小偏差就已经非常奇怪了帕。
t_en: We've seemingly gone off course... Strange, Pom-Pom's navigation is always precise.

t_ch: 得提高警惕！不知道是不是附近有什么奇怪的磁场，干扰列车行进了…{NICKNAME}乘客，跟帕姆一起去控制室看看吧？
t_en: Stay vigilant! There might be a magnetic field nearby interfering with the Express' navigation system. {NICKNAME}, let's take a look in the control room.

t_ch: 呜哇！这是发生什么了！
t_en: Oh no! What was that!?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，三月，列车行进被阻塞了。方才的骚动造成了连锁反应。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, March, the Express encountered an obstruction. The disturbance triggered a chain reaction.

t_ch: …一辆飞船与列车发生了追尾。
t_en: ...The Express was struck from behind by another vessel.

t_ch: 啥情况，列车还能被追尾？
t_en: *sigh* How do you crash into someone in space...

t_ch: 有别的飞船也在这片区域遭遇阻塞，一时没有控制好速度。追尾发生后，有两个家伙找上列车来了。
t_en: Another vessel in our vicinity encountered the same obstruction and was unable to control its velocity. After the collision, two individuals found their way onto the Express.

t_ch: 来碰瓷的？
t_en: Are they trying to extract compensation?

t_ch: 看上去不像。
t_en: It doesn't seem like it.

t_ch: 我们不找交警对付他们就不错啦！
t_en: Compensation? They hit US!

t_ch: 来访客啦？
t_en: We have guests?

t_ch: 这可不多见！但不知道是不是好人。
t_en: Guests? I don't think they're here for tea...

t_ch: 看上去是友善的来客。
t_en: They appear to be friendly.

t_ch: 要是来找列车麻烦，本姑娘可要出手了！走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去看看是什么情况。
t_en: Hmph, if they're here to stir up trouble, I'll teach them a lesson! {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out.

t_ch: 那位红头发的访客…
t_en: That visitor with the red hair...

t_ch: 他上车后一直在盆栽前思考…
t_en: ...he's been lost in thought since he came aboard...

t_ch: 嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
t_en: What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.

t_ch: 走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去找他们聊聊看。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's go chat with them.

t_ch: 看来星穹列车并无大碍，只是这追尾事件…有些稀奇了，连我也是头一次经历。
t_en: The Astral Express seems fine, but a collision like this in space is... a little unusual. Even for me, it's a first.

t_ch: 那位访客看上去是一位骑士…还带着一位随从？
t_en: That visitor appears to be a knight... and it looks like he has a servant?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客！看来我们堵在去洗车星的路上了！
t_en: It seems like we're stuck, {NICKNAME}. Washtopia will have to wait a little longer!

t_ch: 嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
t_en: What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.

t_ch: 你俩怎么就打起来了？！不过打完…你俩好像还挺合得来的嘛。
t_en: What was that all about!? *sigh* It does seem like you're on better terms after the fight.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，能否麻烦你先去检查一下那位维利特先生的状况？他看上去吓得不轻，我们应该礼待来客。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, could you please go check on Velite? He looks uneasy. He is a guest of ours, after all.

t_ch: 怎么样，有什么解决办法吗？
t_en: How do we stand? Is there a way to resolve this situation?

t_ch: 唉…帕姆也在想办法帕！让帕姆看看附近有没有什么线索！
t_en: *sigh* Pom-Pom's still thinking, let me see if there are any clues nearby!

t_ch: 这是…发生什么了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 刚，刚刚的声音…帕姆怎么了？！
t_en: Wh—What was that... Did something happen to Pom-Pom!?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你的进展如何？
t_en: Any progress, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 发生什么了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 怎么了？{NICKNAME}，我正在「享受当下」。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, may I help you? I am currently enjoying the present moment.

t_ch: 靠人力搜查效率比较低，{NICKNAME}，你能想想是否有更迅速的方式吗？
t_en: Scouring the train like this isn't very efficient. {NICKNAME}, any thoughts how to speed thing s up?

t_ch: 我…怎么会看到另一个我呀？
t_en: Why... Why did I see another me?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你的进展如何？
t_en: Any progress, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 现在看来，要与时间比赛了。
t_en: This is a race against the clock.

t_ch: 没想到竟再次碰面…「真蛰虫」。
t_en: I did not envision seeing True Stings again.

t_ch: 列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。这真是难以想象的图景…
t_en: The outer wall of the Express is probably melting in gastric acid. I can't even imagine what it must look like.

t_ch: 列车…被吞进了虫子的胃里？
t_en: So... the train has been swallowed by a giant bug? And we're inside its stomach?

t_ch: 非常意外的情况…连我也未想到。
t_en: This is really a curveball... you couldn't make it up.

t_ch: 没关系，有任何危机我们都一起应对。
t_en: It's alright. We're in this together.

t_ch: 看来最为巨大的丑恶之徒…竟在列车外！
t_en: It would seem our enormous, hideous enemy... is right outside!

t_ch: 列车…在被融化？
t_en: The Express is... melting?

t_ch: 怎会有这么离奇的事！我居然第二次被山洞给吞了…难道这就是我的命运？……
t_en: How is this even possible!? I've been swallowed by a "cave" twice now. Is this my destiny?

t_ch: 得赶紧从真蛰虫胃里出去帕！帕姆，帕姆一点也不想列车受到伤害帕…
t_en: We need to get out of the Sting's stomach as soon as possible! Pom-Pom doesn't want the Express to sustain damage...

t_ch: 你们冷静点呀……
t_en: Everyone, just calm down...

t_ch: 请各位切勿担心。
t_en: Calm yourselves, all of you.

t_ch: 我正在向盆栽进行最后的告别；正如与你们的相遇，能与这列车上诸多生命交友，与大家探讨「纯美」之道，我亦死而无憾！
t_en: I am bidding farewell to this flora. After having made friends with all the beings on the Express, and having discussed "the Beauty" with each of you, I can now depart this mortal coil without regret!

t_ch: 这家伙刚刚就一直抱着盆栽…这短短时间居然和盆栽建立起深厚情谊来了？虽然我也会担心房间里的玩偶……
t_en: Ugh, can you and the fern get a room already? How can anyone establish a bond with a houseplant? ...Although I guess you could say the same about me and my teddy bears...

t_ch: 列车是众人的家，我们遇到什么事都一起面对帕！呜哇，还好{NICKNAME}乘客也回来了…虽然，虽然有点不赶巧了帕。
t_en: The Express is home to all of us — no matter what happens, we're in this together! Woo-hoo, you're back! Although I guess that doesn't change our odds...

t_ch: 我从没有想过，第一次和你们见面竟然就可能是拜拜。哎，看来现在也做不了什么，我维利特就把自己最后的时间，用来听你们说说列车的故事吧……
t_en: Who knew our first meeting would be our last... *sigh* It's hopeless. I'll just spend the rest of my short life listening to your ramblings about the Express, I suppose...

t_ch: 别瞎说，怎么就拜拜了！不过到这个时候，你终于开始对列车有感情了，帕姆也很欣慰帕，让帕姆想想故事从哪里说起才好……
t_en: Nonsense. This won't be our last meeting! But I'm happy the Express has started to grow on you. Now... where should Pom-Pom start the story?

t_ch: 一起呆久了总有感情是不是！不过先停一停啊！我虽然这么说，但列车还是能最后挣扎一下的吧？！
t_en: Gah! Are you really about to tell a story? Look, it's been nice meeting you all and I'd love to shoot the breeze, but are you people really just gonna give up!?

t_ch: 维利特，我会护送你抵达终点；骑士会信守诺言。
t_en: Velite, I will escort you to your destination. A knight always keeps his word.

t_ch: 你别以为一直说这种话我就会感动啊，我这人可是出了名的铁石心肠！
t_en: *sniff* Don't assume you can reassure me that easily. I've got a heart of stone, you hear?

t_ch: 好啦，大家都打起精神来！越到这种时候，我们就越要多传递传递信心呀！
t_en: Okay, that's enough! In times like this, we should be trying to give each other hope!

t_ch: 你其实也很担心列车吧？
t_en: You're worried about the Express, just like everyone else, right?

t_ch: 没，没有的事儿！这么小的麻烦，我们肯定能搞定的啦！
t_en: N—No! The Express is strong — I'm sure we can think of something!

t_ch: 三月也会担心…这也很正常。麻烦你安慰大家了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: It's rare to see March genuinely worried... but given the circumstances. {NICKNAME}, maybe you could try reassuring some of the crew.

t_ch: 列车在「开拓」中总会遇到各种各样的困难…不止现在这一次，在可预见的未来…我毫不怀疑会发生很多类似的事，但我们仍不会停止「开拓」。
t_en: The Express has faced all kinds of obstacles on its journey — today is just another one. It's no reason to stop trailblazing.

t_ch: 这也是「开拓」的意义所在…我们都必须面对挑战。在这个过程中，大家才会获得历练与成长。
t_en: Such is the very essence of trailblazing. It is through these trials that we find wisdom and maturity.

t_ch: 我已对引擎检查完毕。跃迁装置虽无法即刻启动，但暂时加速应当还可以尝试。如果各位没有强烈的反对意见，我们就开始准备……
t_en: I've completed the engine inspection. Though the warp device isn't immediately operational, I believe we can still manage brief spurts of acceleration. Unless there are any major objections, I'll begin preparations.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生——请稍等片刻。
t_en: Mr. Yang, one moment, please.

t_ch: 很抱歉——我突然产生了一个想法，或许能够帮助各位解决危机。在列车准备期间，我希望能获得与{NICKNAME}单独讨论的机会。
t_en: I've suddenly happened upon an idea that might just help resolve our crisis. While the Express is being prepared, I would like to speak with {NICKNAME} in private.

t_ch: 你！都这种时候了，还不能有话直说嘛？
t_en: Seriously? Can't you just tell all of us?

t_ch: 这个想法…如果当众提出，定会被你们立刻否定。但身为骑士，我一定要帮助列车解决问题。
t_en: Were I to air such a proposition among you, verily, it would be dismissed in an instant. Yet as a knight, it is my duty to aid the Express in resolving this issue.

t_ch: 啊？都已经提前做好这种心理准备了吗……
t_en: Oh? So you're a mind reader now, too...?

t_ch: 看来你似乎有所打算。虽然我并不清楚纯美骑士的传统，但…三月，不着急。
t_en: At this stage, any plan is a plan worth hearing. March — hang fire. Let's see where this leads us.

t_ch: 感谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。这真是难以想象的图景…
t_en: The exterior of the Express might be melting in gastric acid... I can't even imagine what it must look like.

t_ch: 啊？！银枝想一个人下车挑战巨真蛰虫？！
t_en: What!? Argenti wants to leave the Express and fight the Giant Sting alone!?

t_ch: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对那份「幻觉」的执着。
t_en: It all depends on whether you support his dedication to that hallucination.

t_ch: …这是他执意坚守的职责。
t_en: ...He insisted on doing his duty.

t_ch: 如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感如此美丽。
t_en: So brief... so unexpected. The chance to get to know all of you on the Express... to witness the beauty of your emotions... is something I'll never forget.

t_ch: 啊啊啊？银枝乘客要自己去？不行不行帕！那也太危险了！
t_en: Wh—What? Argenti wants to go by himself? No way! That's too dangerous!

t_ch: 银枝应该会觉得…这场烟花很美吧。
t_en: I bet Argenti would think these fireworks were really... beautiful.

t_ch: 虽然相识不久，但这家伙人也挺不错的。
t_en: We didn't know him very long, but he was a pretty nice guy.

t_ch: 哎呀，好担心……
t_en: Tsk, I hope he made it...

t_ch: 事情就这么结束了…
t_en: So, it's all over...
Hmm...

t_ch: 幻觉，依托于主观感受、经验，是为看到的一种…个人所求…
t_en: Hallucinations draw on people's feelings and experiences... and can come to represent what we seek the most.

t_ch: 呜哇！{NICKNAME}乘客！你终于回来了！没想到列车大扫除之日这么快就来了帕……
t_en: Wow! {NICKNAME}, you're finally back — and just in time for the Express's grand spring cleaning!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客不知道吧？哼哼，在这宇宙里啊，存在着不少洗车星，它们就像宇宙中为交通工具提供的休息站，而且彼此距离很近，不用启动跃迁装置就能到达！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you ever heard of a "Washtopia"? It's a place where space vehicles can stop to rest — there are plenty of them throughout the universe. They're close enough together that you can travel between them without even activating a warp device.

t_ch: 需要我帮什么忙吗？
t_en: You want me to help with the spring cleaning?

t_ch: 有洗车星应该不用我们动手了吧…
t_en: Phew, so the Washtopia can take care of the spring cleaning...

t_ch: 帕姆也这么想过…但很可惜不行！
t_en: That's what Pom-Pom used to think... but it's not that simple!

t_ch: 洗车星只会帮忙清洁列车车厢的外壳帕，星球上的站点工作人员会把外壳擦得锃亮…不过列车里的座垫、房间、窗户，和那些边边角角的地方…还得我们自己来！
t_en: Washtopias only clean the exterior of the train — and they do a great job, too! However, the seats, rooms, windows — all the nooks and crannies inside the Express... we have to do those ourselves!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客刚在列车落脚，要不要先休息一下，跟大家聊聊天？如果准备得差不多了就可以来找我帕，我们就准备出发咯。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, since you only just got back, why not take a little rest and chat with the Crew? Once you're ready, come find Pom-Pom and we'll prepare to depart.

t_ch: 准备好了，我们走吧。
t_en: I'm ready. Let's go.

t_ch: 我想先休息下。
t_en: A rest sounds good.

t_ch: 嗯！等你噢！
t_en: Okay! I'll be waiting!

t_ch: 噢？好久不见，是帕姆喊你回来的？
t_en: Oh? It's been a while. Did Pom-Pom call you back?

t_ch: 听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
t_en: I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.

t_ch: 星穹列车的确需要定期清理、维护，毕竟这里可是列车组共同的「家」…用心呵护它吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: The Astral Express needs periodic cleaning and maintenance — it's home to the whole crew, after all. Let's take good care of it, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 列车的年度大清洁？我最喜欢整理房间了，一定要趁这次机会好好把各种地方都擦得干干净净的！
t_en: The annual Express spring cleaning? I love tidying rooms! I'll clean everywhere as best I can!

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}，最近可好？
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. How have you been?

t_ch: 听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
t_en: I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.

t_ch: 的确。按照以往的时间来看，已经到了不得不开工的日子，因此帕姆才会如此着急。
t_en: Indeed — it's about that time. I guess that explains why Pom-Pom is in such a hurry.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你回来了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, welcome back.

t_ch: 听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
t_en: I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.

t_ch: 是，我也准备加入。
t_en: Yes, I intend to participate in the efforts as well.

t_ch: 怎么样啦？{NICKNAME}乘客，你准备好我们就开始前往洗车星咯！
t_en: How is everything, {NICKNAME}? If you're ready, let's head to the Washtopia!

t_ch: 准备好了，走吧。
t_en: Ready. Let's go.

t_ch: 稍微等一下。
t_en: I need a little longer.

t_ch: 等你准备好后就回来找我！
t_en: Alright! Come see Pom-Pom when you're ready!

t_ch: （抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆）
t_en: (Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories)

t_ch: 抛出记忆盲点
t_en: Use Cognition Chasm

t_ch: 离开
t_en: Leave

t_ch: （当前收集的记忆盲点无法唤醒模糊的记忆，请收集更多记忆盲点）
t_en: (The Cognition Chasms currently collected are insufficient to restore hazy memories. Please collect more Cognition Chasms)

t_ch: （当前抛出的记忆盲点无法唤醒模糊的记忆，请尝试其他记忆盲点）
t_en: (The Cognition Chasm used cannot restore hazy memories. Please try another Cognition Chasm)

t_ch: （回想起了更多遗漏的记忆）
t_en: (You recall more missing memories)

t_ch: 抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆
t_en: Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories

t_ch: 空间坐标发生了偏移……
t_en: The spatial coordinates have shifted...

t_ch: 时间回到现在……
t_en: Back to the present...

t_ch: 数个系统时前……
t_en: Some system hours ago...

t_ch: （艾丝妲不在么…去跟黑塔说一声好了。）
t_en: (Is Asta not here...? I'll go let Herta know.)

t_ch: （黑塔…被袭击了？）
t_en: (Herta... was attacked?)

t_ch: （总之先去她办公室看看什么情况吧。）
t_en: (Anyways, let's go to her office to see what's going on.)

t_ch: 又见面了，还记得我么——不记得也无所谓，我没有期待。
t_en: Ah, we cross paths again. Do you remember me? Of course, why would you? Memory is such a fickle thing, after all.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，此刻你一定有满腹疑问。稍安勿躁，艾丝妲会一一向你说明。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, you must have many questions. Please be patient, Asta will explain it all to you.

t_ch: 前情你大致也知道了。几个系统时前，黑塔女士的一具人偶遭到了原因未知的袭击，下落不明，信号也始终无法定位。
t_en: You probably know the gist of things already. A few system hours ago, one of Madam Herta's puppets was attacked by an unknown perpetrator. We don't know the location of the puppet, and we can't pinpoint its signal.

t_ch: 没有监控吗？
t_en: There was no surveillance?

t_ch: 没有。袭击发生的地点是站外基台，不在监控范围内。
t_en: No. The attack happened on a base outside the station — beyond the surveillance cameras' range.

t_ch: 黑塔现在在哪里？
t_en: Where is Herta right now?

t_ch: 黑塔女士没把这事放在心上，外出巡访去了。
t_en: She's away on a visit. This issue didn't seem to trouble her much.

t_ch: 事件发生前，她受到了公司的邀请。
t_en: She received an invitation from the IPC before the attack occurred.

t_ch: 是技术研发部。亚婆离女士是位能人，但手下尽是些门外汉，野心勃勃，充满热情，脑袋却一点没有——大小可以和原始人一较高下。
t_en: Ah, the Technology Department. Charming little place, isn't it? Madam Yabuli does possess some semblance of competence, but her subordinates? Oh, they're a riot — brimming with enthusiasm yet utterly devoid of intellect. It's as if evolution halted prematurely for them.

t_ch: 他们想和黑塔开展一些合作，邀请我同行，担任技术顾问。我欣然接受，好近距离观察这群「大聪明俱乐部」的会员如何将公司财产挥霍一空。
t_en: They want to start some new collaborations with Herta and have graciously extended an invite for me to play the role of science consultant. It's delightfully amusing. I can't wait to witness firsthand how these geniuses from the so-called "Super Smart Club" squander the IPC's vast resources.

t_ch: 不过…时机过于严丝合缝了。也许是有人走漏风声，让袭击者利用了此事。而黑塔似乎对这类挑衅见怪不怪，也让我对个中蹊跷甚是好奇。
t_en: However... this attack was timed a little too well. I can't help but wonder if someone leaked this information, and the attackers seized the opportunity. Herta's aloof response to these juvenile provocations? Almost as intriguing. What a delightful little puzzle.

t_ch: 早就听闻拉帝奥先生是学会的翘楚，您愿意协助，是我们的荣幸。
t_en: I've long heard that you're one of the best researchers in the Guild, Dr. Ratio. We are honored to have your assistance.

t_ch: 恭维就免了，你我的时间都很宝贵。况且在一位天才面前谈论凡人的翘楚，在我看来多少有些幽默。
t_en: Save your flattery. Time is hardly a luxury we can squander. To debate the merits of mere mortals in the company of an actual genius? Quite the paradox, if you ask me.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，告诉我——最后一次见到那具人偶时，你做了什么？
t_en: Excuse me, {NICKNAME}, tell me — what were you doing the last time you saw that puppet?

t_ch: …替黑塔跑腿？
t_en: ...Probably running errands for Herta?

t_ch: 别装傻，好好想想。
t_en: Don't play the fool. Think.

t_ch: …听艾丝妲诉苦？
t_en: ...Listening to Asta complain?

t_ch: 嗯？好、好像有这么回事…又好像没有？
t_en: Huh? I—I do remember that happening... I think?

t_ch: 别装傻，好好想想。
t_en: Don't play the fool. Think.

t_ch: …陪阿兰遛狗？
t_en: ...Walking the dog with Arlan?

t_ch: 什么，跟佩佩玩不带我是吧？
t_en: Huh? Invite me next time!

t_ch: 别装傻，好好想想。
